title: Bokkenfolle
excerpt: Ingredients soft butter 500 ml cream 350 ml brown sugar 1 kg store-bought dough 375 ml homemade caramel sauce Method Butter a large flat-bottomed cast-iron pot with a lid, nice and thick. Pour half the cream into the pot and sprinkle half the sugar over. Make balls with the …
html:
Ingredients

  • soft butter
  • 500 ml cream
  • 350 ml brown sugar
  • 1 kg store-bought dough
  • 375 ml homemade caramel sauce

Method

Butter a large flat-bottomed cast-iron pot with a lid, nice and thick.

Pour half the cream into the pot and sprinkle half the sugar over.

Make balls with the store-bought dough and pack them into the pot in a single layer.

Leave the pot, covered with a clean cloth, in a warm spot until the dough has doubled.

Pour the rest of the cream over the balls and sprinkle the rest of the sugar over.

Bake at 180°C for 40 minutes with the lid on, then a further 10 minutes without the lid until cooked through and golden brown.

Serves 6 – 8 portions with the caramel sauce.

Easy!
